## Your background

<!-- Role and industry — e.g. "Quality engineer, aerospace OEM supplier, 10 years" -->
<!-- Skills from practitioners are prioritised. Generic proposals without domain background will not be accepted. -->

## Gap this fills

<!-- What can't an AI agent do today that this skill would enable? -->
